title: Breath of the Wild Pack
description: A resource pack that adds Zelda Breath of the wild ambient music and GUI elements to your game!
body:
A simple resource pack that does the following:
Changes base game music, and biome specific music to breath of the wild music
Changes the defualt ascii font to Breath of the wild Font
Changes some gui, and hud elements to Zelda type elements
Changes the Title logo to "Minecraft:Legend of Zelda Edition"
Changes some Gui sound effects
